scripts.check: node scripts/check-hard-cut-guard.mjs && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm sidecar:build && pnpm sidecar:smoke && pnpm agent:golden-smoke && pnpm sidecar:security-smoke && pnpm release:inventory
scripts.workbench:ux-e2e: pnpm build && pnpm sidecar:build && node scripts/workbench-ux-e2e.mjs
scripts.workbench:live-copilot-e2e: pnpm build && pnpm sidecar:build && node scripts/workbench-live-copilot-e2e.mjs
scripts.sidecar:publish:linux: pnpm build && pnpm tools:fetch:linux && node scripts/release/package-sidecar.mjs --rid linux-x64
scripts.sidecar:publish:windows: pnpm build && pnpm tools:fetch:windows && node scripts/release/package-sidecar.mjs --rid win-x64
